intent: Add format detection to ABS sync pipeline so ebooks are classified as 'epub' with correct download URL and Bearer auth, instead of all items being classified as 'audiobook'. Includes type widening for AbsLibrary.mediaType.
reviewers: security (new Bearer auth path in BookContentService, credential handling)
api-contract (AbsLibrary.mediaType type change, exported detectFormat function)
reliability (error handling for Bearer auth failures in BookContentService)
adversarial (>=50 executable code lines + auth changes + external API integration)
kieran-typescript (TypeScript hooks, services, and type definitions)

applied_fixes.title: Fix sync toast pluralization
applied_fixes.fix: Changed `Synced ${allMappedBooks.length} book` to `Synced ${allMappedBooks.length} book${allMappedBooks.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}` for correct singular/plural handling

findings.title: Duplicated narrator resolution logic
findings.suggested_fix: Extract a shared resolveNarratorNames(absItem: AbsLibraryItem): string[] helper, export it, and use it in both detectFormat and mapAbsItemToBook

findings.title: Missing direct test for mapAbsItemToBook ebook wiring
findings.suggested_fix: Add integration tests that call mapAbsItemToBook (or a testable wrapper) with both ebook and audiobook ABS items, asserting the full Book shape including source.url, chapters.length, and totalDuration

findings.title: detectFormat function is exported but has no type guard or warning about heuristic limitations
Re-sync reclassifies format for all synced items
findings.suggested_fix: Consider persisting detected format separately from sync-derived format to prevent reclassification on ABS metadata changes

requirements_completeness.R1: MET — detectFormat returns 'epub' for items without narrators+duration; format is set from detectFormat result
requirements_completeness.R2: MET — detectFormat returns 'audiobook' for items with narrators AND duration; existing behavior preserved
requirements_completeness.R4: MET — Bearer auth added as first branch in BookContentService.fetchRemoteEpub auth header logic
requirements_completeness.R5: MET — `isEbook ? [] : ...` pattern skips dummy audio chapter synthesis for ebooks
requirements_completeness.R6: PARTIALLY ADDRESSED — heuristic requires both narrators AND duration for audiobook; acknowledged in plan that audiobooks lacking narrator metadata will be reclassified as 'epub'. Startup reclassification migration and manual format override deferred.
requirements_completeness.Unit 1: DONE — Format detection, ebook wiring, sync loop filter widening implemented
requirements_completeness.Unit 2: DONE — Bearer auth support in BookContentService implemented
requirements_completeness.Unit 3: DONE — AbsLibrary.mediaType type widened to include 'ebook'
